package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_field_keys: The same entity ID being logged under many different keys across packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule028NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule028NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule028NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario028Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule028NegativeService, input Rule028NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
